Bus Timings

E303 Bus Schedule Union Square to Al Jubail Bus Station

August 1, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

As we know, The Dubai and Sharjah transport route is one of the busiest routes in the UAE. One of the most frequently used means of transportation for this route is the bus. And there is E303 bus route that connect Dubai and Sharjah city.

This route, managed by the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) of Dubai and the Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA), offers an efficient and affordable way for commuters to travel. Operating from Union Square Metro Station in Dubai to A l Jubail Bus Station in Sharjah, the E303 offers frequent service with modern, comfortable buses equipped with air conditioning and priority seating. Contents

E303 Bus Timing

For those of you who want to take a ride E303 Bus, you must know the timing or schedule of the bus. From Union Square Metro Station, the first bus departs at 6:30 am and the last bust depart at 12.15 am. During peak hours, the bus runs every 15 minutes. while during off-peak hours, the frequency is every 20 minutes​.

And here is the complete of E303 bus timing or schedule from Sunday to Saturday from Union Square Metro Station.

From Union Square From Al Jubail
06:30 07:08
07:02 07:40
07:24 08:02
07:45 08:23
08:05 08:43
08:22 09:00
08:37 09:15
08:49 09:27
09:01 09:39
09:13 09:51
09:25 10:03
09:37 10:15
09:48 10:26
09:59 10:37
10:10 10:48
10:21 10:59
10:35 11:13
10:50 11:28
11:05 11:43
11:20 11:58
11:33 12:11

Download PDF Bus E303

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website, or follow this link to see the E303 Bus Timings. For the timetable from Union Square to Al Jubail Bus Station, you can find the details below:

Read Also: E300 Bus Timings and Route ## E303 Bus Route

The E303 bus route features several strategic stops, making it convenient for passengers to board and disembark close to key locations. There are 8 stops when you travel from Union Square Station to Sharjah, and of course some of them are the landmark of both of the cities. And here is the complete of the stops of E303 bus route.- Union Square Bus Station

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  • Sharjah, Ithihad Road, Ansar Mall
  • Sharjah, Ithihad Road Al Safeer Mall
  • Sharjah, Al Wahda Rd, Subway 1
  • Sharjah, Al Wahda Rd, Al Wahda Center 2
  • Sharjah, Al Wahda Road, City Center 1
  • Sharjah, King Faisl Rd, Gold Souq (Old)
  • Sharjah, Al Jubail Bus Station​

Some other Dubai bus routes you can explore include the J01, which passes through Mall of the Emirates and JVC, as well as the 21, which runs between Al Quoz and Al Ghubaiba Bus Station.## Fare and Facilities

The E303 bus fare is reasonably priced, making it an affordable option for daily commuters. A one-way ticket costs AED 12.

The buses on the E303 route are modern and well-equipped, ensuring a comfortable journey for passengers. Key features include:- Air Conditioning: Essential for comfort in the UAE’s hot climate.

  • Priority Seating: Reserved seats for women, children, and elderly passengers.
  • Comfortable Seating: Plush seats designed for a relaxing ride.

Journey Experience

The E303 bus journey from Union Square to Al Jubail Bus Station is a long but captivating ride, offering a mix of Dubai’s urban vibrancy and Sharjah’s cultural charm. The route then passes through Al Mamzar, known for its beautiful beaches and Al Mamzar Beach Park, a popular spot for families.

The journey ends at Al Jubail Bus Station, a major terminal connecting travelers across the UAE. Though the trip is lengthy, it provides a diverse look at both cities, making it an enriching experience for those exploring the area.## Conclusion

The E303 bus route is an essential transportation link between Dubai and Sharjah. With convenient stops at key locations in both emirates, the E303 ensures accessibility and ease of travel.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 1, 2025.
